title: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest GUI Pack
description: Overhauled Minecraft GUI in the theme off Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest.
body:

# Overview
From the lovable anime, light novel and manga Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest. Enjoy a overhauled GUI Minecraft experience with all the lovable girls and of course the edgy and ruthless Hajime Nagumo.

# Previews - Check the Gallery for more!

### Resourcepack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator using this Resourcepack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Resourcepack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Resourcepack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
